## Core Classes:¶

> [`pyflink.table.TableEnvironment`](<pyflink.table.html#pyflink.table.TableEnvironment> "pyflink.table.TableEnvironment")
>
> Main entry point for Flink Table functionality.
>
> [`pyflink.table.Table`](<pyflink.table.html#pyflink.table.Table> "pyflink.table.Table")
>
> Core component of the Flink Table API. The Flink Table API is built around [`Table`](<pyflink.table.html#pyflink.table.Table> "pyflink.table.Table").
>
> [`pyflink.datastream.StreamExecutionEnvironment`](<pyflink.datastream.html#pyflink.datastream.StreamExecutionEnvironment> "pyflink.datastream.StreamExecutionEnvironment")
>
> Main entry point for Flink DataStream functionality.
>
> [`pyflink.datastream.DataStream`](<pyflink.datastream.html#pyflink.datastream.DataStream> "pyflink.datastream.DataStream")
>
> Core component of the Flink DataStream API. The Flink DataStream API is built around [`DataStream`](<pyflink.datastream.html#pyflink.datastream.DataStream> "pyflink.datastream.DataStream").
